title: Elbaf’s Hidden Corners
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Robin, Unknown person #11, Loki, Usopp, Unknown person #12 as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What now?! If I stop one they all start pricking each other!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's disgusting!! Who could do such a thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The work of a fruit ability!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The kids would reach the fire before we found 'em!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we can't stop the one's in front, then we'll start with bjorn in the back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I can stop the rest one by one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: what I find most scary FENRIR

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: They're actually controlling these monsters too?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: principal! It's not just Western village...

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Other villages are reporting monster sightings!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It must be some kind of ability.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We need to find them, fast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I didn't think Draugrs were real...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who knew taking one down would be this much trouble!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Carry the injured back to the village!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: what I find most scary A NIDHOGGR

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's no use!! They just keep coming!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: what I find most scary A GHOST

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't be able to protect the village... everyone, take cover!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
